nasb.text: But I do not allow a woman to teach or exercise authority over a man, but to remain quiet.

esv.text: I do not permit a woman to teach or to exercise authority over a man; rather, she is to remain quiet.

cnv.text: 我不准女人教導，或轄制男人；女人總要安靜。

ccb.text: 我不准女人教导或管辖男人，她们应当保持安静。

csbs.text: 我不准许女人教导或管辖男人；相反，女人要安静，
